title: Backend Software Engineer
description: Design scalable APIs, build distributed services, write automated tests, optimize PostgreSQL queries, work with Docker, CI/CD, cloud infrastructure, and message queues.

title: Frontend React Engineer
description: Build responsive React applications, implement reusable components, integrate REST APIs, manage state, improve accessibility, optimize web performance, and work with Tailwind or Material UI.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Develop end-to-end web features using Python, Django, JavaScript, React, PostgreSQL, Docker, authentication, API design, testing, and deployment workflows.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Train machine learning models, perform feature engineering, evaluate classifiers, deploy inference pipelines, use Python, scikit-learn, pandas, NLP, embeddings, and model monitoring.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze datasets, build predictive models, use statistics, experimentation, SQL, Python, data visualization, feature extraction, machine learning, and communicate business insights.

title: Data Analyst
description: Create dashboards, write SQL queries, clean datasets, analyze KPIs, build reports, use Python or R, Tableau or Power BI, and translate data into recommendations.

title: Project Manager
description: Plan delivery, manage stakeholders, track milestones, coordinate agile teams, define scope, manage risks, communicate status, and improve delivery processes.

title: Scrum Master
description: Facilitate ceremonies, remove blockers, coach agile practices, manage sprint planning, retrospectives, backlog refinement, team metrics, and continuous improvement.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Run paid campaigns, perform SEO research, manage social media, analyze conversion funnels, create content calendars, optimize landing pages, and measure marketing ROI.

title: Content Marketing Manager
description: Develop content strategy, write campaign briefs, manage brand messaging, coordinate editorial calendars, measure engagement, SEO performance, and lead generation.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Build financial models, analyze budgets, forecast revenue, prepare variance reports, use Excel, SQL, accounting concepts, valuation methods, and executive presentations.

title: Accountant
description: Prepare financial statements, reconcile accounts, manage invoices, apply tax rules, perform month-end close, maintain compliance, and use accounting software.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Create user flows, wireframes, prototypes, design systems, usability tests, visual interfaces, Figma components, accessibility guidelines, and product design documentation.

title: Product Designer
description: Research user needs, map journeys, design prototypes, collaborate with product and engineering, validate concepts, improve interaction patterns, and maintain design systems.

title: Human Resources Specialist
description: Coordinate recruitment, screen candidates, manage onboarding, employee relations, HR policies, performance reviews, HRIS systems, compliance, and internal communication.

title: Talent Acquisition Partner
description: Source candidates, manage interview pipelines, write job descriptions, partner with hiring managers, analyze recruiting metrics, and improve candidate experience.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor security events, investigate incidents, manage vulnerabilities, configure SIEM alerts, perform risk assessment, write reports, and apply network security practices.

title: Security Engineer
description: Design security controls, harden cloud infrastructure, automate threat detection, perform penetration testing, manage IAM, encryption, secure SDLC, and incident response.

title: Sales Manager
description: Manage pipeline, forecast revenue, coach account executives, negotiate contracts, track CRM metrics, develop territory plans, and build enterprise customer relationships.

title: Account Executive
description: Prospect leads, qualify opportunities, run discovery calls, present solutions, manage CRM activities, negotiate deals, and achieve sales quotas.
